implementation_summary.summary: CP00-674 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I test/golden tail, Hermes evidence packet, and Claude review packet descriptors over 40 planned units from RP22.P02.M07.S13 through RP22.P02.M09.S08. It covers validation error mapping, review/approval routing, blocked-claim output, failure behavior, descriptor-only tests, Hermes evidence packet rows, and Claude review packet opening while keeping all product, provider, fixture, test, permission, audit, persistence, Hermes, Claude, and runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-674 RP22.P02.M07.S13-RP22.P02.M09.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
